prompt_text: Create a track that combines the moody, atmospheric trip-hop elements of Portishead with the intricate, melodic guitar work of Johnny Marr and the electronic, progressive house influences of Underworld. The music should complement the following lyrics, which explore themes of time, love, mistakes, and understanding what is dear. The result should be a haunting and emotive blend of trip-hop, alternative rock, and electronic dance music, with layered synths, captivating guitar riffs, and a strong, atmospheric presence.  [Verse] What we carry  As it hangs over time  All our loves and our mistakes  And how they make us defined   [Chorus] You can't see the burdens  But the spirits know what's near  It's only when we're ripped apart That we understand what's dear
prompt_zh: 创作一首结合Portishead的忧郁、氛围化Trip-Hop元素、Johnny Marr复杂而旋律化的吉他演奏以及Underworld的电子、Progressive House影响的曲目。音乐应与以下歌词相辅相成，歌词探讨了时间、爱情、错误和理解珍贵之物的主题。最终结果应是一首融合了Trip-Hop、另类摇滚 (Alternative Rock) 和电子舞曲 (Electronic Dance Music) 的令人难忘且情感丰富的作品，包含层次分明的合成器、引人入胜的吉他旋律和强烈的氛围感。 [主歌] 我们背负的  随时间悬挂在心头  所有的爱与错误  以及它们如何定义了我们 [副歌] 你看不到那些重担  但灵魂知道近在咫尺  只有当我们被撕裂  才能理解何为珍贵
title: Burdens

prompt_text:
Genre: Alternative Rock/Emo
Theme/Subject: Overcoming adversity and finding hope in the face of darkness
Key Elements: Emotive and melodic vocals, atmospheric guitar riffs, introspective and hopeful lyrics
Structure: [Intro], [Verse 1], [Chorus], [Verse 2], [Chorus], [Bridge], [Chorus], [Outro]
Tone/Voice Descriptions: Melancholic, hopeful, emotive, male vocalist
Atmospheric Guitar Riffs: Morningstar features ambient, reverb-heavy guitar riffs that create a melancholic atmosphere.Emotive 
Vocals: Davey Havok’s vocals are emotive, with a blend of softness and intensity.
Dynamic Build-Up: The song builds dynamically, starting softer and gradually adding intensity towards the climax.
Overcoming Darkness: The lyrics focus on overcoming adversity and finding light in the darkness.
Hope and Resilience: There is a strong theme of hope and resilience throughout the song.
prompt_zh:
流派: 另类摇滚/情绪摇滚 (Alternative Rock/Emo)
主题/题材: 战胜逆境并在黑暗中找到希望
关键元素: 情感化的旋律人声，氛围吉他 riff，内省而充满希望的歌词
结构: [前奏], [主歌 1], [副歌], [主歌 2], [副歌], [桥段], [副歌], [尾奏]
音色/人声描述: 忧郁的，充满希望的，情感化的，男性主唱
氛围吉他 riff: Morningstar 特点是氛围感强、混响厚重的吉他 riff，营造出一种忧郁的氛围。
情感化人声: Davey Havok 的人声情感化，兼具柔和与强烈。
动态渐强: 歌曲动态渐强，从柔和开始，逐渐增加强度直至高潮。
战胜黑暗: 歌词集中在战胜逆境并在黑暗中找到光明。
希望与坚韧: 歌曲中贯穿了强烈的希望与坚韧主题。
title: Shadows to Light

prompt_zh: 这段萨克斯独奏应该充满与歌曲相匹配的快乐能量，以一个和弦解决结束，同时结束整首歌。这是一首当代独立/另类/流行摇滚 (Contemporary Indie/Alternative/Pop Rock) 歌曲，由一位女歌手用梦幻且混响厚重的嗓音演唱，有和声和两把电吉他提供节奏和和声支持。女歌手，和声，独立流行 (Indie Pop)，梦幻，海滩，怀旧，年轻，独立，快乐，情感，夏天，怀旧，浪漫，混响，动态，电吉他，合成器。以下是一些与我们想要创造的歌曲氛围相符的艺术家：Hazel English, Alvvays, Day Wave, Glades。歌曲应该具有动态性，副歌部分比主歌部分有更多的和声、吉他和能量。
title: Dream Girl (Indie/Synth Pop, Full Track)

prompt_text: Jazz Fusion: The song features complex harmonies, intricate melodies, and sophisticated chord progressions typical of jazz fusion.Rock Influences: There are elements of rock, especially in the use of electric guitar riffs and driving rhythms.Pop Sensibilities: The track has catchy, memorable melodies and a polished, accessible sound that appeals to a broad audience.Funky Rhythms: The basslines and drum patterns often incorporate funk elements, adding a groovy, danceable quality to the music.Instrumental Virtuosity: The musicianship is top-notch, with each instrument contributing to the overall complexity and richness of the arrangement.Synthesizers and Electronic Elements: Prominent use of synthesizers adds a modern, polished feel to the track.melodic, catchy, passionate, pop,pop rock, energetic, uplifting, , r&b, funk, rock, uplifting, pop, melodic, rhythmic, passionate, romantic, contemporary r&b, pop soul, lush, instrumental
prompt_zh: 这首歌曲包含复杂的和声、精致的旋律和典型的爵士融合 (Jazz Fusion) 和弦进程。摇滚影响 (Rock Influences)：在电吉他 (Electric Guitar) 旋律和强烈的节奏中融入了摇滚元素。流行元素 (Pop Sensibilities)：曲目具有朗朗上口、令人难忘的旋律和精致、易于接受的声音，能够吸引广泛的听众。放克节奏 (Funky Rhythms)：贝斯线 (Basslines) 和鼓点 (Drum Patterns) 经常融入放克元素，使音乐更加摇摆、可舞动。器乐技巧 (Instrumental Virtuosity)：演奏技巧一流，每件乐器都为整体编排的复杂性和丰富性做出了贡献。合成器和电子元素 (Synthesizers and Electronic Elements)：合成器的显著使用为曲目增添了现代、精致的感觉。
title: Funky Love

prompt_text: Create a dreamy, ethereal song in the Dream Pop and Indie Rock genres, evoking a floating, introspective feel. Use lush synthesizers, clean reverb-heavy electric guitar, melodic basslines, and a drum machine for a consistent rhythm. Apply reverb and delay extensively to enhance the spacious, immersive quality. Aim for a moderate tempo of 60 to 90 BPM, with soft, breathy vocals blending into the mix. Include smooth key changes to add depth and movement., jazz,
prompt_zh: 创作一首在Dream Pop和Indie Rock (独立摇滚)流派中的梦幻、飘渺的歌曲，营造一种漂浮、内省的感觉。使用丰富的合成器 (lush synthesizers)、干净且带有大量混响的电吉他 (clean reverb-heavy electric guitar)、旋律贝斯线条 (melodic basslines) 和鼓机 (drum machine) 以保持节奏的一致性。广泛使用混响和延迟 (reverb and delay) 以增强空间感和沉浸感。目标是中等速度，60到90 BPM，用柔和、气息感的 vocals 融入混音中。加入平滑的调性变化 (smooth key changes) 以增加深度和动感。
title: Back to the Source
